title: Villager Monitor
description: This monitor every activity or interactions from a player to a villager.
body:
**VillagerMonitor​**

So this plugin monitors every activity that the player does with the villager.
For example:
- Trading
- How many Items exchanged
- When player interacted with a Villager

It logs with date and time, and name of the player.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e250911bce422d8ef63481ed306f59c1d62ad58.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d63ca762652fc6a2fee3b2c9cd41295280f9c29.png)
